response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with a broad background, but he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ experience is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project, falling dramatically short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. He has no exposure to capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial derivatives — the one domain requirement that cannot be waived. His primary expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which are irrelevant to this engagement.
strengths: Strong communication skills demonstrated through public talks, workshops, and teaching engagements
Solid CI/CD and DevOps experience across multiple employers and platforms
Java background from Altom Consulting satisfies one minor optional requirement
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months total, versus the mandatory 5–10 years required
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domains
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary database work is MongoDB and MySQL
